description: Aggregated periodontal disease and diabetes complication rates for 47 Japanese prefectures (FY2023)

periodontal_rate.label: Periodontal disease treatment rate
periodontal_rate.source: NDB Open Data No.10, FY2023, dental disease classification (K05)
periodontal_rate.notes: Includes both chronic and acute periodontal disease

dm_complication_rate.label: Diabetes complication management fee (B001-20) billing rate
dm_complication_rate.source: NDB Open Data No.10, FY2023, B001-20

hba1c_high_rate.label: Proportion with HbA1c ≥7.0% among specific health checkup recipients
hba1c_high_rate.source: NDB Open Data No.10, FY2022 specific health checkup data

aging_rate.label: Proportion of population aged ≥65 years
aging_rate.source: Statistics Bureau of Japan, 2020 Population Census

pop_density.label: Population density
pop_density.source: Statistics Bureau of Japan, 2020 Population Census

income_per_capita.label: Taxable income per taxpayer (proxy for income)
income_per_capita.source: National Tax Agency, Prefectural Tax Statistics

smoking_rate.label: Self-reported current smoking rate among specific health checkup recipients
smoking_rate.source: NDB Open Data No.10, FY2022 specific health checkup questionnaire (Q29)

bmi_obesity_rate.label: Proportion with BMI ≥25 among specific health checkup recipients
bmi_obesity_rate.source: NDB Open Data No.10, FY2022 specific health checkup data

citation: Saito H, et al. Geographic Association between Periodontal Disease Burden and Diabetes Complication Management Rates in Japan. [Journal, Year]. DOI: TBD
